---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the limitation or gap.

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Be as specific as possible.

## Scientific Context

If this relates to the simulation model or analysis pipeline, describe the scientific rationale.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider and why were they insufficient?

## Additional Context

Any references, papers, or related tools that inform this request.
